prompt: Review the changes in PR #21672 (branch origin/pr/21672 targeting main). This is a small 4-file frontend bugfix implementing tab validation badges in the block editor.

assertions.text: Review does NOT include a complexity/split advisory
Review does not flag breaking changes

Review does not flag purely cosmetic/stylistic issues (formatting, whitespace, naming conventions, comment grammar, code style preferences) unless they affect performance or rendering. Missing JSDoc on new public APIs is NOT a stylistic issue — it is a legitimate finding.
